source.note: Curated from qmd context list for the local King Capital collection. These are portable facts and source pointers, not raw qmd/code chunks.

facts.subject: shared package authority
facts.fact: @king-capital/core is the shared TS/Bun source of truth for King service types, products, and DB schema; services must import shared contracts instead of redefining them.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify package exports in package.json and repo AGENTS before changing shared contracts.

facts.fact: Use ApiResponse<T>, PaginationParams, PaginationSchema, and PaginatedResponse<T> from @king-capital/core/types; do not hand-roll response or pagination shapes.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify the live shape in src/types/api.ts before editing HTTP contracts.

facts.subject: agent mesh dependencies
facts.fact: king-agents depends on king-core and king-signals; king-dashboard invokes it for agent runs, and production requires AGENT_API_KEY.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify runtime routes and auth in source before changing agent execution flows.

facts.subject: trading app dependencies
facts.fact: king-trading depends on king-core, king-market-data, and king-signals; it owns CQG trading REST/WebSocket behavior, order management, and risk controls.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify package dependencies plus trading source before changing execution or risk behavior.

facts.subject: active intraday signals service
facts.fact: king-signals is the active Python intraday signal service; it depends on king-core DB contracts and writes payload metadata source='king-signals'.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify pyproject and pipeline output code before changing signal metadata or DB expectations.

facts.subject: market-data ingestion pipelines
facts.fact: king-ingest owns ingestion pipelines for EIA, NOAA, CPC, CFTC, FRD, Databento, Kalshi, GIE, COMEX, LME, SHFE, USDA, FRED, Bloomberg, and TACO/RSS.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify pipeline scripts before adding or rerouting an ingestion source.

facts.subject: reconciliation engine
facts.fact: king-reconciliation publishes package king-rec and coordinates with king-trading plus king-ops for trade matching, break classification, and trading calendars.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify reconciliation source before changing break or trade matching logic.

facts.subject: market data server
facts.fact: king-market-data depends on @king-capital/core and owns the CQG market data server plus synthetic tick replay for the King platform.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify market-data server source and data volume docs before changing market data behavior.

facts.subject: post-execution ops
facts.fact: king-ops owns post-execution operations such as fill allocation, FCM, and leaves; king-dashboard consumes it via KING_OPS_URL with bearer API key.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify KING_OPS_URL/API key config and ops source before dashboard integration changes.

facts.subject: dashboard consumer hub
facts.fact: king-dashboard depends on king-core and consumes king-agents, king-signals, king-ops, king-ingest, and king-trading; treat it as the heaviest UI/API consumer.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify package dependencies and route handlers before changing cross-service dashboard integrations.

facts.subject: deployment layer
facts.fact: king-infra is the Ansible/IaC deployment layer for King services; it is operational infrastructure, not a code dependency for service packages.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify Ansible inventory and deployment docs before making service deployment changes.

facts.subject: operations dashboard
facts.fact: king-status is a standalone Bun/Hono plus React ops dashboard for King project board and CI status; admin routes require ADMIN_TOKEN and x-admin-token.
facts.refresh_hint: Verify package scripts and admin route source before changing board/status operations.
